DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES, AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 27, 2026 TO GIVE THE PARTIES AN ADDITIONAL OPPORTUNITY TO MEET AND CONFER TO RESOLVE ALL OR SOME OF THE REMAINING ISSUES RAISED BY THIS MOTION. THE PARTIES ARE REQUIRED TO MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY REMOTE PLATFORM NO LATER THAN NOON ON APRIL 24, 2026. NO LATER THAN 4PM ON APRIL 24, 2026 COUNSEL FOR MA SHALL SEND AN EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT301TR@SFTC.ORG WITH A COPY TO OPPOSING COUNSEL STATING, WITHOUT ARGUMENT, THE ISSUES/DISCOVERY REQUESTS, IF ANY, THAT REMAIN UNRESOLVED AFTER THEIR MEET AND CONFER SESSION. DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES, AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. ARGUED AND THE COURT RULES THE SCOPE IS NARROWED AS FOLLOWS: THE HR TEAM WITHIN HEADQUARTERS, PREGNANCY AND SEXUAL DISCRIMINATION AGAINST WOMEN, AND RETALIATION BASED ON MEDICAL LEAVE. DEFENDANT IS TO MAKE AMENDMENTS AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 30 DAYS. PARTIES ARE TO WORK ON A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER FOR REVIEW. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Continued To Jan-04-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Set For Trial On Sep-28-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses, And To Produce Documents
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES, AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS

Appearances via Zoom:
Bryan McCormack of the McCormack Law Firm (415.925.5161, bryan@bmcclaw.com) for plaintiff and moving party;
Rachel Capler of Orrick Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP (415.773.5700, rcapler@orrick.com) for defendant and opposing party.

Counsel confirm there are 3 interrogatories and one document request outstanding after their meet and confer efforts. The matter is argued and the court rules the scope is narrowed as follows: the HR team within headquarters, pregnancy and sexual discrimination against women, and retaliation based on medical leave. Defendant is to make amendments and produce documents within 30 days. Parties are to work on a proposed form of order for review. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses, And To Produce Documents
Off Calendar Apr-24-2026 Continued To Apr-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES, AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to April 27, 2026 to give the parties an additional opportunity to meet and confer to resolve all or some of the remaining issues raised by this motion. The parties are required to meet and confer in person or by remote platform no later than noon on April 24, 2026. No later than 4pm on April 24, 2026 counsel for Ma shall send an email to contestdept301tr@sftc.org with a copy to opposing counsel stating, without argument, the issues/discovery requests, if any, that remain unresolved after their meet and confer session. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-15-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
